infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FieldConnect needs microphone access to record voice notes for daily logs and events.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FieldConnect needs camera access to take photos for punch lists and documentation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FieldConnect needs photo library access to attach existing photos to your reports.

plugins.microphonePermission: FieldConnect needs microphone access to record voice notes.

plugins.cameraPermission: FieldConnect needs camera access to take photos for documentation.
plugins.microphonePermission: FieldConnect needs microphone access to record audio.

plugins.photosPermission: FieldConnect needs access to your photos to attach images to reports.
